security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob: data:; worker-src 'self' blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:* http://localhost:* https://api.anthropic.com https://api.openai.com https://openrouter.ai https://nothumanallowed.com https://duckduckgo.com

bundle.shortDescription: The most advanced AI IDE ever made
bundle.longDescription: WebCraft is a desktop IDE built for the AI-native developer. From a single prompt, the agent builds entire projects across any language, runs them in bundled dev-servers, queries embedded databases, and shows every change in a live red/green diff stream.
